name: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp.
description: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. is one of the world's largest precious metals streaming companies, with agreements covering over 20 operating mines and 12 development projects across multiple continents. The streaming model provides leveraged exposure to silver and gold prices through fixed-cost purchase agreements with mining partners, without direct ownership of mining operations or associated capital costs. Wheaton is guiding for approximately 900,000 gold equivalent ounces in 2026, with a long-term profile growing to 1.2 million GEOs by 2030.
